steps.name: Login to the site as 'System admin' with '0819.130015.25.super@email.com'
Enter the user's email in the 'Email' field
Enter the user's password in the 'Password' field

steps.name: Click on 'System administration' in the Header
Select '0819.130015 company to bend Fraud Control' company using filter
Select 'Business unit 0819.130015' business unit using filter
Verify the success message ‘SUCCESSBusiness unit control was deleted successfully' is displayed
Verify that the business unit control table doesn't include the deleted control
